# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The latest version on the `main` branch is actively maintained and receives security fixes.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do not open a public issue**. Instead, report
it privately using GitHub's [Security Advisories](https://github.com/security/advisories) feature
on this repository, or contact the maintainer directly.

Please include:

- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept.
- Any suggested remediation, if available.

You can expect an initial response within a few business days. Once the issue is confirmed and a
fix is released, we are happy to credit you for the responsible disclosure.
